description: SynthWatch monitor registry. Each entry binds a stable `id` (the key SynthWatch monitors reference) to a Playwright script in monitors/. The SCRIPT (the how) lives here; the MONITORING CONFIG (interval, locations, alerting, enabled) lives in SynthWatch's DB bound to this id. SynthWatch discovers scripts by reading this manifest after syncing the repo. Add a monitor by adding a .spec.ts under monitors/ AND an entry here; CI validates the two stay in sync.

monitors.name: Wegmans: search → product page
monitors.description: Search wegmans.com for ginger sparkling water, open the Wegmans-brand product, assert the product page loads.

monitors.name: Wegmans: recipe navigation
monitors.description: Navigate Meals & Recipes → Courses → Dinner → the cauliflower-crust pesto pizza recipe, assert the recipe loads.

monitors.name: Meals2Go: cheese pizza carry-out cart (Buffalo/McKinley)
monitors.description: Recon-first carry-out cheese-pizza flow: establish CARRY OUT fulfillment (Buffalo, NY → McKinley store), open the takeout Pizza menu, add a cheese pizza to the cart, assert the line item via the cart-items API, then self-clean by removing it. Cart-mutating but anonymous/accountless (no login, payment, or PII); self-cleans the added item. Non-sensitive by decision: the guest session token is short-lived and protects nothing.

monitors.name: SynthWatch dashboard homepage
monitors.description: Example/self-monitoring flow: the SynthWatch dashboard loads and renders the monitor grid. Template for new flows.

monitors.name: Wegmans: homepage load
monitors.description: Load wegmans.com and assert the homepage renders with core navigation and shopping content.

monitors.name: Wegmans: shop category browse
monitors.description: Browse the Beverages department, open the first product, assert the product detail loads.

monitors.name: Wegmans: store locator
monitors.description: Open the store locator, search for Buffalo NY, assert at least one store result appears.

monitors.name: Meals 2 Go: homepage load
monitors.description: Load meals2go.com and assert the Meals 2 Go homepage renders with ordering UI.

monitors.name: Wegmans: recipe search
monitors.description: Search for chicken recipes, open the first result, assert the recipe detail page loads.

monitors.name: Amore: reservations OpenTable widget loads
monitors.description: Load wegmansamore.com/reservations and verify the embedded OpenTable booking widget loader fires (network), plus the RESERVE YOUR TABLE heading. Never books. Capability check; sensitive=false.

monitors.name: Amore: menu page exposes a downloadable menu
monitors.description: Load wegmansamore.com/menus and assert a downloadable menu link (PDF) is present -- the 'view the menu' affordance, resilient to dish/price changes.

monitors.name: Next Door: homepage location picker
monitors.description: Load wegmansnextdoor.com and assert both server-rendered location links (Rochester + Astor Place) render -- the homepage's location-picker capability.

monitors.name: Next Door: reservations OpenTable widget loads
monitors.description: Load wegmansnextdoor.com/rochester-new-york/reservations and verify the embedded OpenTable booking widget loader request fires (rid=2407), plus the Reserve Your Table heading. Mirrors amore-reservations. Never books. Capability check; sensitive=false.

monitors.name: Wegmans: search autocomplete suggestions
monitors.description: Type a partial query in the header search and assert the Algolia search-as-you-type query returns 200 + a suggestion option renders. NEVER submits (no Enter -- avoids the waterloo race). sensitive=false (public Algolia search key).

monitors.name: Meals 2 Go: browse a cuisine menu (anon)
monitors.description: Anonymous discovery journey: load meals2go.com/browse-menu/pizza-wings and assert the kitting menus API returns 200 + item cards render. NEVER carts. Anonymous/accountless against a public page (no login, payment, or PII). Non-sensitive by decision: the guest session token is short-lived and protects nothing.

monitors.name: Meals 2 Go: browse a catering menu (anon)
monitors.description: Anonymous catering discovery journey: load meals2go.com/browse-catering/custom-cakes and assert the kitting menus API with catering=true returns 200 + item cards render. Distinct from meals2go-browse-menu by the catering=true backend surface (high-ticket catering funnel, untouched by the takeout browse). NEVER carts. Anonymous/accountless against a public page (no login, payment, or PII). Non-sensitive by decision: the guest session token is short-lived and protects nothing.
